meaning: 渤海(位于辽东半岛与山东半岛之间)
examples: Seriously polluted oceanic area in Bohai Sea occupied 3 thousand square kilometers.
The Bohai Sea is China's continental sea, while the Yellow, East China and South China seas are marginal seas of the Pacific Ocean.
These sea gulls used to find food in the Bohai Bay sea area off Dalian city which was covered by heavy ice because of the cold weather.
